html:
Exclusive to:

The Swinesbury Mineral Exchange is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of Minerals to the player. It also allows the exchange of Oincs.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, the Swinesbury Mineral Exchange also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Cut Stone, two Gold Nuggets and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Doors
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering the Swinesbury Mineral Exchange, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Banker Pig clerk works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the bank which will be restocked by the clerk:

Item Name
Centapiece Oinc 100
Tenpiece Oinc 10
Gold Nugget 10

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the clerk:

Item Name Amount
Charcoal 1 2
Flint 1 2
Nitre 1 2
Rocks 1 6

Decor

  • Velvetrope Backwall
  • Velvetrope Sidewall
  • Clock
  • Clock
  • Clock
  • Vault

Shelfs

  • Floating Shelf

Pillar

  • Pillar Bank Wall Corner
  • Pillar Bank Wall Front

Doors

  • Exit

Trivia

  • Swinesbury Mineral Exchange was added in the Aporkalypse update.
  • By placing a single Oinc at both sides of the bottom right stanchion, it is possible to easily kill the bank teller and steal everything except the items at the bottom right display cabinet. Be sure to buy all three before performing your bank heist!

Gallery

  • The interior of Swinesbury Mineral Exchange.
StructuresCraftable Items

“Ah. A useful place for a change.”
–Wilson
“A bunch of big shots in there.”
–Willow
“Is having many coins.”
–Wolfgang
“A fruitless attempt to make change in this world.”
–Wendy
“A PLACE OF CURRENCY UPGRADES”
–WX-78
“Contains coins of different denominations. Should be quite interesting.”
–Wickerbottom
“What kind of loonie coins do they have in there?”
–Woodie
“Can I exchange this money for anything useful?”
–Maxwell
“A place of rudimentary coinage alchemy.”
–Wagstaff
“It hölds the secret öf change making.”
–Wigfrid
“I bet they have a big coin collection.”
–Webber
“Where the money is.”
–Walani
“A place to convert my loose change!”
–Warly
“t be fulla tha dubloons!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS HOUSE O' CHANGE”
–Wilba
“Twirly Tail Shiny place”
–Wormwood
“Nothing more adventurous than exchanging money.”
–Wheeler
The Swinesbury Mineral Exchange is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of Minerals to the player. It also allows the exchange of Oincs.
If the player obtains the Key to the City, the Swinesbury Mineral Exchange also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Cut Stone, two Gold Nuggets and four Pig Skins.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Swinesbury Mineral Exchange was added in the Aporkalypse update.
By placing a single Oinc at both sides of the bottom right stanchion, it is possible to easily kill the bank teller and steal everything except the items at the bottom right display cabinet. Be sure to buy all three before performing your bank heist!

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sàn giao dịch khoáng sản Swinesbury là Cấu trúc Cửa hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Thành phố lợn Swinesbury và bán nhiều loại Khoáng sản cho người chơi. Nó cũng cho phép trao đổi Oincs.
title: Swinesbury Mineral Exchange

Allows the exchange of [[Oinc]]s. |biome = [[Pig City]] |spawnCode = "pig_shop_bank"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Ah. A useful place for a change. |willow = A bunch of big shots in there. |wolfgang = Is having many coins. |wendy = A fruitless attempt to make change in this world. |wx78 = A PLACE OF CURRENCY UPGRADES |wickerbottom = Contains coins of different denominations. Should be quite interesting. |woodie = What kind of loonie coins do they have in there? |maxwell = Can I exchange this money for anything useful? |wagstaff = A place of rudimentary coinage alchemy. |wigfrid = It hölds the secret öf change making. |webber = I bet they have a big coin collection. |walani = Where the money is. |warly = A place to convert my loose change! |woodlegs = t be fulla tha dubloons! |wilba = 'TIS HOUSE O' CHANGE |wormwood = Twirly Tail Shiny place |wheeler = Nothing more adventurous than exchanging money. |choose = maxwell}} The '''Swinesbury Mineral Exchange''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in [[Pig City|Swinesbury Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[:Category:Minerals|Minerals]] to the player. It also allows the exchange of [[Oinc]]s. If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], the Swinesbury Mineral Exchange also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Cut Stone]], two [[Gold Nugget]]s and four [[Pig Skin]]s. ==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior== Upon entering the Swinesbury Mineral Exchange, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A [[Banker Pig]] clerk works at the desk. The following items can be found on displays in the center of the bank which will be restocked by the clerk: {| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;" width=45%; ! width="25%" | Item ! width="50%" | Name ! width="25%" | {{pic|32|Oinc}} |- |{{pic|32|Centapiece Oinc}} |[[Oinc|Centapiece Oinc]] |'''100''' |- |{{pic|32|Tenpiece Oinc}} |[[Oinc|Tenpiece Oinc]] |'''10''' |- |{{pic|32|Gold Nugget}} |[[Gold Nugget]] |'''10''' |} Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the clerk: {| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;" width=45%; ! width="25%" | Item ! width="30%" | Name ! width="20%" | {{pic|32|Oinc}} ! width="25%" | Amount |- |{{Pic32|Charcoal}} |[[Charcoal]] |'''1''' |'''2''' |- |{{Pic|32|Flint}} |[[Flint]] |'''1''' |'''2''' |- |{{Pic|32|Nitre}} |[[Nitre]] |'''1''' |'''2''' |- |{{Pic32|Rocks}} |[[Rocks]] |'''1''' |'''6''' |} ==[[File:Wiki Decor Icon.png|32px]] Decor == Velvetrope Backwall Decor.png|Velvetrope Backwall Velvetrope Sidewall Decor.png|Velvetrope Sidewall Clock_Decor.png|Clock Clock_Decor2.png|Clock Clock_Decor3.png|Clock Vault Decor.png|Vault ===Shelfs=== Swinesbury Mineral Exchange Shelf.png|[[Shelves_Tab|Floating Shelf]] ===Pillar=== Pillar Bank Wall Corner Decor.png|Pillar Bank Wall Corner Pillar Bank Wall Front Decor.png|Pillar Bank Wall Front ===Doors=== Swinesbury Mineral Exchange Door.png|Exit =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Swinesbury Mineral Exchange was added in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet#Version History|Aporkalypse]]'' update. *By placing a single Oinc at both sides of the bottom right stanchion, it is possible to easily kill the bank teller and steal everything except the items at the bottom right display cabinet. Be sure to buy all three before performing your bank heist! =={{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Swinesbury Mineral Exchange interior.png|The interior of Swinesbury Mineral Exchange.
